figures.caption: Figure 3: Boxplot overview. Top row: objective entropy (a) and subjective strength ratings (b) across password models. Bottom row: gaze dynamics — saccade velocities by context (c), saccade velocity as memorability predictor (d, 𝑝 = .046), and pupil size during recall (e, 𝑝 = .116).
Figure 2: Examples of AOI logging, red boxes were not visible to participants during the experiment.
